# gss_channel_bindings_t

**Type Alias**

A pointer to a channel bindings descriptor that specifies the communications channel used to carry a context.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias gss_channel_bindings_t = UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_channel_bindings_struct>
```

## Instance Properties

- **acceptor_address**: The network address of the acceptor, in the form specified by [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_channel_bindings_struct/acceptor_addrtype].
- **acceptor_addrtype**: The type of address contained in the [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_channel_bindings_struct/acceptor_address] field.
- **application_data**: Application specific data for use in communicating a channel binding.
- **initiator_address**: The network address of the acceptor, in the form specified by [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_channel_bindings_struct/initiator_addrtype].
- **initiator_addrtype**: The type of address contained in the [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_channel_bindings_struct/initiator_address] field.

## Channel Bindings

- **gss_ctx_id_t**: A pointer to an opaque type that you use to communicate context pointers with GSS-API functions.
- **gss_channel_bindings_struct**: The structure defining a channel bindings descriptor that specifies the communications channel used to carry a context.
- **gss_const_channel_bindings_t**: A pointer to an immutable channel bindings descriptor that you use to specify the communications channel used to carry a context.
